economic_notes: First Nation acquired 15% ownership in 2317186 Ontario Limited o/a Happy Time Tours and Travel for $255,000 in October 2018. COVID-19 pandemic declared March 2020, expected to impact future revenues and expenditures. Water treatment plant under construction (CIP $12,150,965). Section 95 housing construction in progress ($2,177,324). Bridge construction in progress ($451,215).
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to incomplete tangible capital asset inventory — First Nation has not fully adopted PSAB Section 3150 and cannot confirm all major asset classes are captured. Neskantaga Economic Development Corporation is fully consolidated as a subsidiary. Capital projects segment shows large surplus of $3,703,837 driven by $6,544,373 in federal transfers against $2,896,165 in expenses, likely reflecting remediation and water treatment plant funding recognized as revenue. Deferred revenue of $5,554,507 entirely from ISC. Water treatment plant CIP balance of $12,150,965 is significant. Contractor claim related to water treatment plant settled November 2020 and recorded at year-end. No schedule of remuneration provided in document. COVID-19 pandemic noted as subsequent event with no material financial impact on FY2020 but expected future impacts.
